name: Weighted User Rating Score (WURS)
description: A score calculated from app store ratings: (avg_rating * num_ratings + global_mean * m) / (num_ratings + m), where m is the 25th percentile of number of ratings across all candidate apps. This balances the raw average rating with the confidence provided by the volume of ratings, ensuring that apps with many high ratings are ranked above those with few ratings or lower averages. The score is extracted directly from publicly available app store data and is fully traceable and reproducible.
